meta.name: dotnet-framework
meta.title: Dotnet Framework Skill
meta.description: Guidance for working with .NET Framework projects. Includes project structure, C# language version, NuGet management, and best practices. Triggers on: **/*.csproj, **/*.cs

original_definition.skill_description: Guidance for working with .NET Framework projects. Includes project structure, C# language version, NuGet management, and best practices. Triggers on: **/*.csproj, **/*.cs

actions.name: .NET Framework projects use the legacy project format, which
actions.description: .NET Framework projects use the legacy project format, which differs significantly from modern SDK-style projects:

actions.name: Build Configuration: Contains explicit `<PropertyGroup>` sec
actions.description: Build Configuration: Contains explicit `<PropertyGroup>` sections for Debug/Release configurations

actions.name: StringBuilder for concatenation: Use `StringBuilder` for mul
actions.description: StringBuilder for concatenation: Use `StringBuilder` for multiple string concatenations

actions.name: Dispose pattern: Implement `IDisposable` properly for unmana
actions.description: Dispose pattern: Implement `IDisposable` properly for unmanaged resources

actions.name: Connection strings: Store in `<connectionStrings>` section,
actions.description: Connection strings: Store in `<connectionStrings>` section, not `<appSettings>`

actions.name: Transformations: Use web.config/app.config transformations f
actions.description: Transformations: Use web.config/app.config transformations for environment-specific settings

rules.description: Always use `msbuild /t:rebuild` to build the solution or projects instead of `dotnet build`
rules.name: Always use `msbuild /t:rebuild` to build...

rules.description: Explicit File Inclusion: All new source files MUST be explicitly added to the project file (`.csproj`) using a `<Compile>` element
rules.name: Explicit File Inclusion: All new source...

rules.description: .NET Framework projects do not automatically include files in the directory like SDK-style projects
rules.name: NET Framework projects do not automatically...

rules.description: No Implicit Imports: Unlike SDK-style projects, .NET Framework projects do not automatically import common namespaces or assemblies
rules.name: No Implicit Imports: Unlike SDK-style projects,...

rules.description: When recommending NuGet packages, ensure they are compatible with .NET Framework or .NET Standard 2.0 (not only .NET Core or .NET 5+).
rules.name: When recommending NuGet packages, ensure they...

rules.description: This project is limited to C# 7.3 features only. Please avoid using:

rules.description: Explicit null checks instead of null-coalescing assignment
rules.name: Explicit null checks instead of null-coalescing...
